steps.title: Identify the structural requirement
steps.content: The subject “The poem” is singular. The sentence has no main verb yet; the blank is where it belongs.

steps.title: Apply finite verb agreement
steps.content: A main clause verb must be finite and agree with its subject in number. “Contains” is the only finite form—third-person singular—that matches the singular subject. The other three are non-finite forms (participles and infinitive) that cannot function as main verbs. That matches choice D — D is correct.
